name: io.github.ProfessionalWiki/mediawiki-mcp-server
title: MediaWiki MCP Server
description: MCP server enabling AI clients to interact with any MediaWiki wiki through standard tools

environmentVariables.name: CONFIG
environmentVariables.description: Path to your configuration file

environmentVariables.name: MCP_ALLOW_STATIC_FALLBACK
environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' to allow HTTP startup when config.json has static credentials. Otherwise the server refuses to start, preventing silent shared-identity fallback for unauthenticated requests.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_CONTENT_MAX_BYTES
environmentVariables.description: Byte cap for content bodies (wikitext, rendered HTML, diffs) returned by get-page, get-pages, parse-wikitext, and compare-pages. Oversized bodies are truncated with a trailing marker.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_LOG_LEVEL
environmentVariables.description: Minimum severity for logger output (stderr telemetry and sendLoggingMessage broadcast). Invalid values fail loudly on first log call.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_MAX_REQUEST_BODY
environmentVariables.description: Maximum HTTP request body size on the StreamableHTTP transport. Accepts size strings like 1mb or 512kb.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_METRICS
environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' to expose Prometheus metrics at GET /metrics on the HTTP transport. Has no effect on the stdio transport.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_OAUTH_CREDENTIALS_FILE
environmentVariables.description: Override the default OAuth credentials store path. Default: ~/.config/mediawiki-mcp/credentials.json on Linux/macOS, %APPDATA%\mediawiki-mcp\credentials.json on Windows.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_OAUTH_NO_BROWSER
environmentVariables.description: Set to '1' to skip launching a browser during the OAuth dance and log the auth URL to stderr instead. Useful in headless environments and CI.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_PUBLIC_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the request-derived public URL used in the protected-resource discovery doc and WWW-Authenticate header. Set this when running behind a proxy that rewrites the request Host.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_SESSION_IDLE_TIMEOUT
environmentVariables.description: Seconds an HTTP session may sit idle before it is closed and removed on the StreamableHTTP transport. Any request resets the timer. Set to 0 to disable expiry.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_SHUTDOWN_GRACE_MS
environmentVariables.description: Maximum milliseconds to wait for in-flight /mcp calls to drain on SIGTERM/SIGINT before exiting. Capped at 600000.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_TRANSPORT
environmentVariables.description: Type of MCP server transport

environmentVariables.name: PORT
environmentVariables.description: Port used for StreamableHTTP transport
